title: adenostegia maritima
intro: Adenostegia maritima, also known as the saltbush, is a shrub-like plant that is native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been known to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Adenostegia maritima is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
